invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.1005（基于ATR 0.0017和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.1005 (based on ATR 0.0017 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破89.5（基于ATR 1.5819和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 89.5 (based on ATR 1.5819 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).
